mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, p.title AS post_title, c.nickname, c.email, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status = #{status} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, p.title AS post_title, c.nickname, c.email, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, p.title AS post_title, c.nickname, c.email, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, p.title AS post_title, c.nickname, c.email, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id WHERE c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, nickname, email, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{content}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
